creator: frankch@waru.life.nthu.edu.tw
text:
A new port zh-rxvt-2.4.4 for the Chinese category. This port
        enable the support for BIG5 Chinese of rxvt-2.4.4. Extra patches
        have been applied to add support for XCIN, a Chinese Input 
        Server.

Fix: 

The port rxvt-port.tar.gz have been uploaded to ftp.freebsd.org.
        Just commit this port.
